title: My work feature Request
excerpt: In My Work, I’m noticing that for subitems you can only see what parent item they belong to by clicking on the subitem symbol which is an extra step. It would be great if we could add more/customize columns in this featu…

posts.author: Dayna (Dayna Barr)
posts.cookedHtml: In My Work, I’m noticing that for subitems you can only see what parent item they belong to by clicking on the subitem symbol which is an extra step. It would be great if we could add more/customize columns in this feature and include the parent item it belongs to somehow in just a quick glance. It would also be nice to be able to sort the columns. I know it’s in Beta…hopefully some of these features will arise!

posts.author: jepinkston (Jessica Pinkston)
posts.cookedHtml: Also if we could adjust the size of the columns that would be great. Some of my dates are not showing completely on the “My Work” feature.

posts.author: cindy.h (Cindy)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, I would love to be able to resize columns! Seems like a very basic thing, so my team can see full dates and times in their schedules.
